description: The flowchart_complex sample has an aspect_ratio ERROR because character-based text estimation (CharacterSizeEstimator with char_width_ratio 0.6) produces ~7% wider layouts than browser getBBox. Selkie: 1361x1108 (ratio 1.23), Reference: 1274x1089 (ratio 1.17). Fixing this requires more sophisticated font metrics or per-character width tables.
title: Flowchart: flowchart_complex aspect_ratio error from text width estimation
